_comment: Cartopian PM containment — Tier-2 native-sandbox DEPTH profile (FR-007 / TASK-01-005). Loaded by wrappers/bin/cartopian-claude-pm via --settings, BENEATH the DEC-001 tool-removal floor. The floor (--tools "") removes Bash/Read/Write/Edit so this layer is normally inert; it exists for defense-in-depth: if the floor were ever bypassed and a shell/file tool reappeared, Claude Code's OWN native OS sandbox (sandbox-exec/seatbelt on macOS, bubblewrap on Linux) still denies the product-repo / work-root filesystem reach and raw write/exec. Native mechanism + config only — no third-party sandbox (NF-001). Absolute paths are host/project-specific, exactly as wrappers/etc/mcp-cartopian-only.json hard-codes the cartopian-mcp path; regenerate them for another project root / work root.
